Title: [EXP-001] Expense Automation Liquidation and Spend Control
Description: Build the canonical expense lane in Odoo with receipt capture, OCR, cash advance/liquidation, approval workflow, accounting posting, and bounded analytics enrichment.
Acceptance Criteria: Expense intake, OCR, liquidation, approval, accounting, and analytics enrichment all work end to end.

Title: Expense intake - receipt invoice and attachment capture
Parent Title: [EXP-001] Expense Automation Liquidation and Spend Control
Description: Support employee expense submission and vendor invoice/receipt attachment upload in Odoo.
Acceptance Criteria: Expenses can be submitted with attachments; validation rules enforce required fields; duplicates are detected.

Title: Support employee expense submission in Odoo
Parent Title: Expense intake - receipt invoice and attachment capture
Description: Enable expense line creation by employees.
Acceptance Criteria: Employees can create expense records.

Title: Support vendor invoice/receipt attachment upload
Parent Title: Expense intake - receipt invoice and attachment capture
Description: Allow attachment upload on expense records.
Acceptance Criteria: Attachments upload and are retrievable.

Title: Add duplicate-detection rules
Parent Title: Expense intake - receipt invoice and attachment capture
Description: Detect duplicate expense submissions.
Acceptance Criteria: Duplicate submissions are flagged before approval.

Title: Expense OCR - Azure Document Intelligence ingestion
Parent Title: [EXP-001] Expense Automation Liquidation and Spend Control
Description: Extract merchant, date, total, tax, currency from receipts via Azure Document Intelligence.
Acceptance Criteria: OCR extracts key fields; low-confidence extractions are queued for review; regression set exists.

Title: Extract merchant date total tax currency
Parent Title: Expense OCR - Azure Document Intelligence ingestion
Description: Implement OCR field extraction pipeline.
Acceptance Criteria: Key receipt fields are extracted accurately.

Title: Build confidence scoring and exception queue
Parent Title: Expense OCR - Azure Document Intelligence ingestion
Description: Score extraction confidence and route low-confidence items.
Acceptance Criteria: Low-confidence items appear in review queue.

Title: Map OCR output to draft expense fields
Parent Title: Expense OCR - Azure Document Intelligence ingestion
Description: Map parsed OCR payload to Odoo expense draft fields.
Acceptance Criteria: Draft expenses are pre-filled from OCR output.

Title: Cash advance and liquidation workflow
Parent Title: [EXP-001] Expense Automation Liquidation and Spend Control
Description: Model cash advance request, release/approval, and liquidation against advance.
Acceptance Criteria: Advances can be requested, approved, released, and liquidated with balance tracking.

Title: Model cash advance request
Parent Title: Cash advance and liquidation workflow
Description: Create cash advance request model.
Acceptance Criteria: Cash advance requests can be created.

Title: Model liquidation against advance
Parent Title: Cash advance and liquidation workflow
Description: Track expense liquidation against outstanding advances.
Acceptance Criteria: Liquidation offsets are tracked correctly.

Title: Track outstanding balances by employee
Parent Title: Cash advance and liquidation workflow
Description: Report outstanding advance balances.
Acceptance Criteria: Balance report shows current state per employee.

Title: Expense approvals and spend policy enforcement
Parent Title: [EXP-001] Expense Automation Liquidation and Spend Control
Description: Add approval matrix by department/amount/type with non-compliant expense flags.
Acceptance Criteria: Approvals enforce policy; non-compliant expenses are flagged; audit trail exists.

Title: Add approval matrix by department amount type
Parent Title: Expense approvals and spend policy enforcement
Description: Configure approval routing rules.
Acceptance Criteria: Approvals route correctly by matrix.

Title: Add non-compliant expense flags
Parent Title: Expense approvals and spend policy enforcement
Description: Flag expenses that violate spend policy.
Acceptance Criteria: Non-compliant items are visible to approvers.

Title: Expense accounting and reimbursement posting
Parent Title: [EXP-001] Expense Automation Liquidation and Spend Control
Description: Map approved expenses to Odoo accounting entries and reimbursement payables.
Acceptance Criteria: Approved expenses post to correct accounts; liquidation offsets work; posted entries are immutable.

Title: Map approved expense to Odoo accounting entries
Parent Title: Expense accounting and reimbursement posting
Description: Post approved expense to journal.
Acceptance Criteria: Journal entries are created correctly.

Title: Prevent direct mutation of posted entries
Parent Title: Expense accounting and reimbursement posting
Description: Enforce immutability on posted entries.
Acceptance Criteria: Posted entries cannot be directly modified.

Title: Expense analytics and bounded enrichment
Parent Title: [EXP-001] Expense Automation Liquidation and Spend Control
Description: Publish expense facts to lakehouse and build gold views for spend, turnaround, and delinquency.
Acceptance Criteria: Expense data lands in lakehouse; gold views exist; writeback is bounded to enrichment fields only.

Title: Publish expense facts to lakehouse
Parent Title: Expense analytics and bounded enrichment
Description: ETL expense records to bronze.
Acceptance Criteria: Expense records land in bronze layer.

Title: Build gold views for spend turnaround delinquency
Parent Title: Expense analytics and bounded enrichment
Description: Create curated gold datasets.
Acceptance Criteria: Gold views are queryable and demo-ready.

Title: [COP-001] Odoo Copilot Joule-style Bounded Actions and Genie Insight Surface
Description: Deliver a governed assistant layer for Odoo using Foundry/Azure AI patterns with bounded actions, analytics-driven insights, and role-safe copilots.
Acceptance Criteria: Copilot shell exists; bounded actions are enforced; insights surface curated gold data; eval/tracing is active.

Title: Odoo Copilot core shell
Parent Title: [COP-001] Odoo Copilot Joule-style Bounded Actions and Genie Insight Surface
Description: Add copilot launcher in Odoo UI with role-aware entry points and session model.
Acceptance Criteria: Copilot is accessible from Odoo; sessions persist; audit logging works.

Title: Add copilot launcher in Odoo UI
Parent Title: Odoo Copilot core shell
Description: Implement copilot widget entry point.
Acceptance Criteria: Copilot launcher appears in Odoo.

Title: Add role-aware entry points by app/module
Parent Title: Odoo Copilot core shell
Description: Show contextual copilot based on user role.
Acceptance Criteria: Different roles see appropriate entry points.

Title: Add audit/event logging
Parent Title: Odoo Copilot core shell
Description: Log copilot interactions.
Acceptance Criteria: All copilot events are logged.

Title: Joule-style bounded action model for Odoo
Parent Title: [COP-001] Odoo Copilot Joule-style Bounded Actions and Genie Insight Surface
Description: Define read-only vs bounded-write tools and block unrestricted transactional writes.
Acceptance Criteria: Tools are classified; sensitive actions require confirmation; out-of-policy requests are denied and logged.

Title: Define read-only vs bounded-write tools
Parent Title: Joule-style bounded action model for Odoo
Description: Classify each copilot tool by access level.
Acceptance Criteria: Tool classification is documented and enforced.

Title: Block unrestricted transactional writes
Parent Title: Joule-style bounded action model for Odoo
Description: Prevent copilot from making uncontrolled writes.
Acceptance Criteria: Unrestricted writes are blocked.

Title: Add confirmation flow for sensitive actions
Parent Title: Joule-style bounded action model for Odoo
Description: Require human confirmation for sensitive actions.
Acceptance Criteria: Sensitive actions show confirmation dialog.

Title: Genie-style analytics and insight surface
Parent Title: [COP-001] Odoo Copilot Joule-style Bounded Actions and Genie Insight Surface
Description: Expose curated gold datasets to insight assistant with source citation and freshness metadata.
Acceptance Criteria: Insights draw from curated data; citations link to source; freshness is visible.

Title: Expose curated gold datasets to insight assistant
Parent Title: Genie-style analytics and insight surface
Description: Connect gold views to insight prompts.
Acceptance Criteria: Insight assistant can query gold datasets.

Title: Add source citation and evidence behavior
Parent Title: Genie-style analytics and insight surface
Description: Include data source references in responses.
Acceptance Criteria: Responses include source citations.

Title: Expense Copilot
Parent Title: [COP-001] Odoo Copilot Joule-style Bounded Actions and Genie Insight Surface
Description: Summarize OCR results, explain policy violations, suggest corrections, and draft liquidation summaries.
Acceptance Criteria: Copilot assists expense review with explanations and suggestions.

Title: Summarize OCR results for review
Parent Title: Expense Copilot
Description: Generate human-readable OCR summary.
Acceptance Criteria: OCR summaries are clear and accurate.

Title: Explain policy violations
Parent Title: Expense Copilot
Description: Provide natural-language policy violation explanations.
Acceptance Criteria: Violations are explained clearly.

Title: Project and delivery copilot
Parent Title: [COP-001] Odoo Copilot Joule-style Bounded Actions and Genie Insight Surface
Description: Summarize project/task status, generate risk summaries, suggest next actions, and produce stakeholder updates.
Acceptance Criteria: Project copilot provides accurate status summaries linked to Boards items.

Title: Summarize project/task status from Odoo
Parent Title: Project and delivery copilot
Description: Generate project status summary.
Acceptance Criteria: Status summary reflects current Odoo state.

Title: Link project context to Boards items
Parent Title: Project and delivery copilot
Description: Reference Azure Boards items in copilot output.
Acceptance Criteria: Copilot output links to relevant Board items.

Title: Copilot eval tracing and operational guardrails
Parent Title: [COP-001] Odoo Copilot Joule-style Bounded Actions and Genie Insight Surface
Description: Add prompt registry, offline eval set, runtime trace capture, and release gate for copilot changes.
Acceptance Criteria: Eval/trace infrastructure exists; copilot changes require quality gate passage.

Title: Add prompt/version registry
Parent Title: Copilot eval tracing and operational guardrails
Description: Track prompt versions.
Acceptance Criteria: Prompt versions are registered and auditable.

Title: Add runtime trace capture
Parent Title: Copilot eval tracing and operational guardrails
Description: Capture runtime execution traces.
Acceptance Criteria: Traces are stored and reviewable.

Title: [INT-001] Odoo Projects to Azure Boards Integration with Odoo-Wins Execution Authority
Description: Implement directional, contract-governed integration between Odoo Projects and Azure Boards where Azure Boards holds planning truth and Odoo holds execution truth.
Acceptance Criteria: Sync exists; field mapping is documented; Odoo wins for execution fields; reconciliation evidence exists.

Title: Authority contract - Azure Boards planning vs Odoo execution
Parent Title: [INT-001] Odoo Projects to Azure Boards Integration with Odoo-Wins Execution Authority
Description: Define object mapping, field ownership, sync directions, conflict resolution, and idempotency keys.
Acceptance Criteria: Contract doc and SSOT YAML are published and approved.

Title: Define source-of-truth by field
Parent Title: Authority contract - Azure Boards planning vs Odoo execution
Description: Document which fields are owned by Boards vs Odoo.
Acceptance Criteria: Field ownership is documented.

Title: Define conflict resolution rules
Parent Title: Authority contract - Azure Boards planning vs Odoo execution
Description: Specify Odoo-wins rule for execution fields.
Acceptance Criteria: Conflict rules are documented.

Title: Publish contract doc and SSOT YAML
Parent Title: Authority contract - Azure Boards planning vs Odoo execution
Description: Create machine-readable contract artifact.
Acceptance Criteria: SSOT YAML exists at ssot/integrations/.

Title: Directional execution sync from Odoo Projects to Azure Boards
Parent Title: [INT-001] Odoo Projects to Azure Boards Integration with Odoo-Wins Execution Authority
Description: Sync task state, percent complete, blocker/status summaries from Odoo to Boards.
Acceptance Criteria: Odoo execution state appears in Boards; Boards cannot overwrite Odoo execution fields.

Title: Sync task state changes from Odoo to Boards
Parent Title: Directional execution sync from Odoo Projects to Azure Boards
Description: Implement state change projection.
Acceptance Criteria: State changes flow from Odoo to Boards.

Title: Prevent Boards from overwriting Odoo execution fields
Parent Title: Directional execution sync from Odoo Projects to Azure Boards
Description: Enforce write protection on synced fields.
Acceptance Criteria: Manual Boards edits to synced fields are overwritten on next sync.

Title: Planning sync from Azure Boards to Odoo project scaffolding
Parent Title: [INT-001] Odoo Projects to Azure Boards Integration with Odoo-Wins Execution Authority
Description: Pull new backlog items and title/description/priority changes from Boards to Odoo.
Acceptance Criteria: New Boards items create Odoo project scaffolding; invalid execution overwrites are rejected.

Title: Pull new backlog items into Odoo
Parent Title: Planning sync from Azure Boards to Odoo project scaffolding
Description: Import new Boards items as Odoo tasks.
Acceptance Criteria: New items appear in Odoo.

Title: Reject invalid execution-state overwrites
Parent Title: Planning sync from Azure Boards to Odoo project scaffolding
Description: Block Boards planning from overwriting Odoo execution state.
Acceptance Criteria: Invalid overwrites are logged and rejected.

Title: Integration observability audit and reconciliation
Parent Title: [INT-001] Odoo Projects to Azure Boards Integration with Odoo-Wins Execution Authority
Description: Add sync run logs, mismatch detection, replay/recovery, daily reconciliation, and failure alerts.
Acceptance Criteria: Sync runs are logged; mismatches are detected; failures alert; evidence packs are generated.

Title: Add sync run logs and run IDs
Parent Title: Integration observability audit and reconciliation
Description: Log each sync run with unique ID.
Acceptance Criteria: Run logs exist and are queryable.

Title: Add daily reconciliation summary
Parent Title: Integration observability audit and reconciliation
Description: Produce daily sync health report.
Acceptance Criteria: Daily report shows sync status and mismatches.
